title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd:
PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd!
